ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 使用哪个 AI 提供商

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow the model to search the web when it needs current information
ast.target: 允许模型在需要当前信息时搜索网络

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Safety limit for the agent loop (default: 20)
ast.target: 代理循环的安全限制（默认：20）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Not connected. Sign in with ChatGPT to use this provider.
ast.target: 未连接。请使用 ChatGPT 登录以使用此提供商。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 输入完整的模型标识符

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 API 密钥

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA \`<svelte:boundary>\` \`reset\` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please wait for the current response to complete.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 转录内容已复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the content of a markdown document. If no path is given, reads the currently active document.
ast.target: 读取 Markdown 文档的内容。如果未提供路径，则读取当前活动文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the document relative to vault root. Omit to read the active document.
ast.target: 相对于保险库根目录的文档路径。省略则读取活动文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Edit a markdown document. Supports three operations: 'replace_all' replaces the entire content, 'find_replace' finds a specific string and replaces it, 'insert' adds content at a position.
ast.target: 编辑 Markdown 文档。支持三种操作：'replace_all' 替换整个内容，'find_replace' 查找特定字符串并替换，'insert' 在指定位置添加内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the document. Omit to edit the active document.
ast.target: 文档路径。省略则编辑活动文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The type of edit to perform.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The exact text to find (required for find_replace).
ast.target: 要查找的精确文本（find_replace 必需）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Where to insert content (required for insert). 'after_frontmatter' inserts after the --- block.
ast.target: 插入内容的位置（insert 必需）。'after_frontmatter' 在 --- 块之后插入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for files in the vault by filename or content. Returns matching file paths and snippets.
ast.target: 按文件名或内容在保险库中搜索文件。返回匹配的文件路径和片段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search query (matched against filenames and optionally content).
ast.target: 搜索查询（与文件名匹配，可选与内容匹配）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to also search inside file contents (slower). Default: false.
ast.target: 是否也搜索文件内容（较慢）。默认：false。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 返回的最大结果数。默认值：10。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the full content of any file in the vault by its path.
ast.target: 通过路径读取保险库中任何文件的完整内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the file relative to vault root.
ast.target: 相对于保险库根目录的文件路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new file in the vault. Fails if the file already exists. IMPORTANT: The filename is the title in Obsidian, so never start content with an H1 heading that repeats the filename.
ast.target: 在保险库中创建一个新文件。如果文件已存在则失败。重要提示：在 Obsidian 中，文件名即标题，因此内容切勿以重复文件名的 H1 标题开头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the new file relative to vault root (e.g. 'Notes/meeting.md').
ast.target: 新文件相对于保险库根目录的路径（例如 'Notes/meeting.md'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List files in the vault, optionally filtered by folder and/or extension.
ast.target: 列出保险库中的文件，可按文件夹和/或扩展名进行筛选。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folder path to list (e.g. 'Projects'). Omit to list all files.
ast.target: 要列出的文件夹路径（例如 'Projects'）。省略则列出所有文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter by file extension (e.g. 'md'). Omit to include all types.
ast.target: 按文件扩展名筛选（例如 'md'）。省略则包含所有类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rename or move a file in the vault. Can be used to rename a note or move it to a different folder.
ast.target: 重命名或移动保险库中的文件。可用于重命名笔记或将其移动到不同的文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Current path of the file relative to vault root.
ast.target: 文件相对于保险库根目录的当前路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New path for the file relative to vault root.
ast.target: 文件相对于保险库根目录的新路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move a file to the Obsidian trash. Use with caution.
ast.target: 将文件移动到 Obsidian 的回收站。请谨慎使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path of the file to delete relative to vault root.
ast.target: 要删除的文件相对于保险库根目录的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the YAML frontmatter properties of a markdown document as structured data. Returns tags, aliases, and all custom properties.
ast.target: 读取 Markdown 文档的 YAML 前置属性，返回结构化数据。包括标签、别名和所有自定义属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the document. Omit to use the active document.
ast.target: 文档的路径。省略则使用当前活动文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find all notes in the vault that link to a given document. Uses Obsidian's metadata cache for fast lookups.
ast.target: 查找保险库中所有链接到指定文档的笔记。使用 Obsidian 的元数据缓存进行快速查找。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the current date and time in the user's local timezone. Useful for daily notes, journaling, scheduling, or any time-aware task.
ast.target: 获取用户本地时区的当前日期和时间。适用于每日笔记、日志记录、日程安排或任何需要时间感知的任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open a document in the Obsidian editor. Use this when the user wants to navigate to, view, or open a specific file.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 编辑器中打开文档。当用户想要导航到、查看或打开特定文件时使用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ask the user a clarifying question. Use this when you need more information before proceeding. The conversation will pause until the user responds.
ast.target: 向用户提出一个澄清性问题。当您需要更多信息才能继续时使用此功能。对话将暂停，直到用户响应。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The question to ask the user.

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将对话记录复制到剪贴板

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中文本发送到聊天

ast.name: text
ast.source: Sign in with your ChatGPT account instead of using an OpenAI API key. Requests are routed through the ChatGPT/Codex backend (not
ast.target: 使用您的 ChatGPT 帐户登录，而不是使用 OpenAI API 密钥。请求通过 ChatGPT/Codex 后端路由（非

ast.name: text
ast.source: ) and require an active ChatGPT plan with Codex access. The available models mirror the Codex CLI catalog.
ast.target: ），并且需要具有 Codex 访问权限的有效 ChatGPT 计划。可用模型与 Codex CLI 目录一致。

ast.name: text
ast.source: 1. Open this page in any browser:
ast.target: 1. 在任何浏览器中打开此页面：

ast.name: text
ast.source: 2. Enter this code on the page:

ast.name: text
ast.source: Waiting for authorization. You can return here after signing in.
ast.target: 等待授权。您可以在登录后返回此处。
